channel.title: Maxim Autos — Vehicle Inventory
channel.description: Used vehicles for sale at Maxim Autos in Skokie, IL 60077. Phone +18475108947.

item.g:title: 2016 Volkswagen Tiguan SE 4Motion
item.g:description: The 2016 Volkswagen Tiguan SE 4Motion offers turbocharged AWD performance, near luxury cabin quality, and confident German engineered handling. Burgundy exterior, automatic transmission, 2.0L turbo four cylinder. This Tiguan delivers a genuinely sporty ride with a fit and finish that punches above its price point.Key features: 2.0L TSI turbocharged engine making 200 horsepower, 6 speed automatic Tiptronic transmission, 4Motion all wheel drive for confident handling in Chicago winters, sliding and reclining second row seats for flexible cargo and passenger space, V Tex leatherette seating, heated front seats, dual zone climate control, panoramic sunroof, and VW's MIB II touchscreen infotainment with Bluetooth and smartphone integration. A practical, well equipped compact SUV built for year round driving.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicleMetal plates issued on the spot, drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL, minutes from Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the greater North Shore Chicago area. Call today to schedule a same-day appointment.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.[!@@Additional Info@@!]F 0026R Head Curtain Air Bags,Stability Control,Power Door Locks,4-Cyl Turbo 2.0 Liter,AM/FM Stereo,ABS (4-Wheel),Navigation System,Tilt Wheel,Cruise Control,Daytime Running Lights,SiriusXM Satellite,Keyless Start,Roof Rails,Keyless Entry,Bi-Xenon Headlamps,Bluetooth Wireless,Panorama Roof,Fog Lights,Air Conditioning,CD/MP3 (Single Disc),Traction Control,Heated Seats,AWD,Power Steering,Side Air Bags,Dual Air Bags,Alloy Wheels,Backup Camera,Auto 6-Spd Tiptronic Spt,Power Windows,Rollover Protection,Hill Start Assist,Anti-Theft System

item.g:title: 2017 Volkswagen Golf Alltrack S 4Motion AWD
item.g:description: 2017 Volkswagen Golf Alltrack TSI S, 4Motion AWD, heated seats, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. White on gray leatherette, 1.8L turbo engine, 6 speed DSG automatic. The wagon that hauls like a crossover and drives like a Golf, ready for Chicago in every season.Key features: standard 4Motion AWD, 170 hp 1.8L turbo engine, heated front seats, leatherette seating, touchscreen with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, rearview camera, Bluetooth, cruise control, alloy wheels, rear spoiler, and a 5 star NHTSA safety rating. With 6.9 inches of ground clearance and a deep, unobstructed cargo bay, it carries bikes, strollers, or a full airport run without breaking a sweat.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicleMetal plates issued on the spot, drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL, minutes from Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, and Des Plaines, serving the North Shore Chicago area. Call (847) 510-8947 to schedule a same day appointment.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.[!@@Additional Info@@!]F 0026R Head Curtain Air Bags,Heated Seats,Dual Power Seats,Alarm System,Backup Camera,AWD,Rear Spoiler,Alloy Wheels,Fog Lights,Traction Control,Roof Rack,Tilt 0026 Telescoping Wheel,CD/MP3 (Single Disc),AM/FM/HD Radio,Air Conditioning,Electronic Stability Control,Power Door Locks,VW Car-Net,Dual Air Bags,Automatic 6-Spd DSG w/Tiptronic,Power Windows,Bluetooth Wireless,ABS (4-Wheel),SiriusXM Satellite,Hill Hold Assist Control,Servotronic Steering,Side Air Bags,Cruise Control,4-Cyl Turbo 1.8 Liter,Daytime Running Lights

item.g:title: 2015 Honda Civic SE
item.g:description: 2015 Honda Civic SE Sedan, 130,772 miles, all black inside and out. The SE was Honda's Special Edition, slotted right between the base LX and the higher EX, and it is the trim Civic shoppers hunt for. It bundles roughly $1,100 in added equipment over the LX, which is why clean SE models hold value and move fast. Easy on gas, easy to drive, a perfect first car or daily commuter for the North Shore. The AC blows ice cold, so your summer commute stays cool and comfortable.The standout is Honda LaneWatch. Flip your right turn signal and a camera in the passenger mirror shows your entire blind spot on the 7 inch touchscreen, so lane changes feel a lot safer. That same screen runs Display Audio with Bluetooth and smartphone integration, plus a backup camera. The SE also adds automatic climate control, cruise control, push button start, smart entry, USB input, and alloy wheels. Under the hood is Honda's proven 1.8 liter four cylinder paired with a smooth automatic CVT and front wheel drive, EPA rated 30 city and 39 highway. These engines routinely run past 300,000 miles on basic maintenance, so at 130,772 miles this one is barely broken in, and the 2015 Civic earned an IIHS Top Safety Pick.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicleMetal plates issued on the spot, drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsSkokie, IL. Serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, North Shore Chicago. Call (847) 510-8947 for a same day appointment.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Alarm System,Daytime Running Lights,Alloy Wheels,Dual Air Bags,ABS (4-Wheel),Side Air Bags,Power Windows,AM/FM Stereo,Traction Control,F 0026R Head Curtain Air Bags,Automatic CVT,Power Steering,Stability Control,CD/MP3 (Single Disc),4-Cyl i-VTEC 1.8 Liter,LaneWatch Blind-Spot,Power Door Locks,Backup Camera,Tilt 0026 Telescoping Wheel,Air Conditioning,Keyless Entry,Cruise Control,FWD,Bluetooth Wireless

item.g:title: 2015 Volvo XC60 2015.5 T6 R-Design Platinum
item.g:description: 2015 Volvo XC60 T6 R-Design Platinum. 325 HP Turbo, AWD, Paddle Shifters, Harman Kardon Audio, Panoramic Sunroof, Navigation, Adaptive Cruise Control, Full Safety Package. Gray on black, automatic, 3.0L Turbo. A Scandinavian performance crossover that looks refined and drives like a sports car, 0 to 60 in roughly 6 seconds. Surprisingly easy on gas for a 325 horsepower all wheel drive performance SUV, returning up to 24 mpg on the highway. Dual zone climate control blows ice cold, so the cabin stays comfortable through the hottest Chicago summer.Key features: turbocharged 3.0L inline six with 325 HP and 365 lb-ft of torque, all wheel drive, paddle shifters, R-Design sport package with 20 inch alloy wheels, aggressive front grille, rear diffuser and dual exhausts, sport leather seats with heat front and rear, heated steering wheel, panoramic sunroof, Harman Kardon 12 speaker premium audio, navigation, power tailgate, proximity keyless entry, Adaptive Cruise Control with queue assist, Collision Warning with auto brake, Pedestrian Detection, Blind Spot Information System, and Lane Departure Warning. Nearly 9 inches of ground clearance and over 67 cubic feet of cargo with rear seats folded.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicleMetal plates issued on the spot, drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL, serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the entire North Shore Chicago area. Same day appointments available, call or stop by today.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Power Windows,F 0026R Head Curtain Air Bags,Bluetooth Wireless,6-Cyl Turbo 3.0 Liter,Oversized Premium Wheels 20+,Adaptive Cruise Control,CD/MP3 (Single Disc),Navigation System,Tilt Wheel,Alarm System,BLIS,Keyless Entry,Power Door Locks,F 0026R Parking Sensors,Panorama Roof,AWD,Side Air Bags,Daytime Running Lights,Keyless Start,Stability Control,Power Steering,Volvo Sensus,harman/kardon Sound,Auto 6-Spd Geartronic,Bi-HID Headlamps,Air Conditioning,SiriusXM Satellite,Convenience Pkg,Technology Pkg,Leather,AM/FM Stereo,Dual Air Bags,Traction Control,Dual Power Seats,ABS (4-Wheel)

item.g:title: 2016 Volvo V60 Cross Country
item.g:description: 2016 Volvo V60 Cross Country T5, Adventure ready and great everyday driver. An AWD wagon with a turbocharged 2.5L engine, heated leather seats, a heated steering wheel, and a sunroof. Yakima RoofRacks and extras. Black on a black leather interior with a smooth automatic. Built for drivers who want all weather grip and real wagon space without stepping up to a full size SUV. Even with standard all wheel drive, it stays easy on gas at up to 28 mpg on the highway. The AC blows ice cold to keep you cool through hot Chicago summers.Key features: AWD with a turbocharged 2.5L engine, leather seating, heated front seats and heated steering wheel, sunroof, navigation, blind spot monitor, lane departure warning, memory driver seat, power seats, rear parking sensors, full roof rack, backup camera, smart key entry, Bluetooth, and alloy wheels. The Cross Country trim adds raised ground clearance and rugged body cladding, so you get confident traction through Chicago winters with the cargo room and ride comfort of a wagon.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicleMetal plates issued same day so you can drive home todayTransparent pricing with no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL, serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the North Shore Chicago area. Same day appointments available, call us to set up a time to see this Volvo.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Dual Power Seats,Power Door Locks,Navigation System,High Performance Radio,5-Cyl Turbo 2.5 Liter,Keyless Entry,Side Air Bags,Traction Control,Rear Spoiler,Dual Air Bags,Cruise Control,Alarm System,SiriusXM Satellite,Backup Camera,Power Steering,Hill Descent Control,Keyless Drive,Rear Park Assist,ABS (4-Wheel),Moon Roof,Daytime Running Lights,Air Conditioning,Bluetooth Wireless,F 0026R Head Curtain Air Bags,Power Windows,Leather,AWD,Volvo Sensus,Tilt 0026 Telescoping Wheel,CD/MP3 (Single Disc),Alloy Wheels,Dynamic Stability Control,AM/FM Stereo,Auto 6-Spd Gtrnc Adpshft

item.g:title: 2016 Honda CR-V LX AWD
item.g:description: 2016 Honda CR-V LX. Remote start, cooled down by the time you enter, AWD, backup cam, and legendary reliability. Silver on charcoal, automatic, 2.4L. A family SUV ready for Chicago summer road trips and year round commuting in the suburbs. The AC blows ice cold, and it is great on gas for an SUV, returning up to 31 mpg on the highway.Key features: 4WD, Honda's bulletproof 2.4L engine, automatic transmission, sport utility 4 door configuration, A/C, power windows and locks, cruise control. Practical cargo space and rear seat room, perfect first family car or commuter.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicleMetal plates issued on the spot, drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL, serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, and the entire North Shore Chicago area. Same day appointments available, call or stop by today.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. item.g:title: 2019 Honda HR-V LX AWD
item.g:description: 2019 Honda HR-V LX AWD, the small SUV that lives bigger than its footprint. Black on black, CVT automatic, 1.8L i-VTEC engine with Real Time AWD. Easy to park in the city, easy on gas on the highway, and ready for four seasons of Chicago weather.Key features: Real Time AWD with Intelligent Control, Honda's Magic Seat second row that folds flat or flips up for tall cargo, multi angle rearview camera, Bluetooth audio and phone, cruise control, alloy wheels, and an EPA rated 27 city and 31 highway MPG. Fold the rear seats and the HR-V opens up 57.6 cubic feet of cargo room, among the best of any small SUV.The Maxim Autos DifferenceIndependent inspection report included with every vehicleMetal plates issued on the spot, drive home todayTransparent pricing, no hidden feesFinancing for all credit levelsLocated in Skokie, IL, minutes from Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, and Des Plaines, serving the entire North Shore Chicago area. Call (847) 510-8947 to set up a same day appointment.Every car inspected. Every price transparent. item.g:title: 2019 Hyundai Tucson SE AWD
item.g:description: 2019 Hyundai Tucson SE 4WD, 70,524 miles, champagne metallic on beautiful light beige leather interior. Good on gas for an all wheel drive SUV, with up to 25 mpg on the highway. The AC blows ice cold to keep you comfortable through the hottest Chicago summer days. The Tucson SE brings premium safety and tech into an affordable, easy to own compact SUV, which is why it punches above its price. The right size for the city, comfortable and quiet on the highway, and simple to park, it makes a smart daily driver for the North Shore. What sets the SE apart is how much comes standard. Hyundai's safety suite includes Forward Collision Avoidance Assist with automatic emergency braking, Lane Keeping Assist, and Driver Attention Warning, so the tech is watching the road with you. The 7 inch touchscreen runs Apple CarPlay and Android Auto with Bluetooth, and you also get 17 inch alloy wheels, automatic headlights, a backup camera, and a 60/40 split folding rear seat for flexible cargo space. Power comes from a 2.0 liter four cylinder with 161 horsepower and a smooth 6 speed automatic, EPA rated 25 mpg. The ride soaks up rough roads, the cabin stays quiet, and Hyundai's strong reliability reputation means it just keeps going. The Maxim Autos Difference Independent inspection report included with every vehicle 15 day / 500 mile Illinois powertrain protection, extended coverage available Metal plates issued on the spot, drive home today Transparent pricing, no hidden fees Financing for all credit levels Skokie, IL. Serving Evanston, Niles, Morton Grove, Lincolnwood, Des Plaines, North Shore Chicago. Call (847) 510-8947 for a same day appointment. Every car inspected. Every price transparent. Every customer protected.
